data.title: RED test: Write failing tests for ticket deduplication and creation
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add tests to tests/hooks/test-directory-monitor.sh for the ticket dedup and creation logic.

## Test Approach
- Given an oversized directory with no matching open ticket tagged dir:<path>, When _dm_create_tickets is called, Then a new P4 epic is created with the dir:<path> tag
- Given an oversized directory with an existing open ticket tagged dir:<path>, When _dm_create_tickets is called, Then no new ticket is created
- Given an oversized directory with a closed ticket tagged dir:<path>, When _dm_create_tickets is called, Then a new ticket IS created (dedup checks open only)
- Given the hook completes, When advisory output is checked, Then flagged directories are listed on stderr

Mock the ticket CLI commands (ticket list, ticket create) to isolate dedup logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least 3 new test functions added for dedup logic (no-ticket-creates, open-ticket-skips, closed-ticket-creates)
  Verify: grep -c 'test_.*dedup\|test_.*ticket\|test_.*create' tests/hooks/test-directory-monitor.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Tests use mocked ticket CLI commands (not real ticket system)
  Verify: grep -q 'mock\|stub\|fake\|_TICKET_CMD' tests/hooks/test-directory-monitor.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED markers updated for dedup test functions
  Verify: grep '\[.*dedup\|.*ticket\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'directory-monitor'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) when run before dedup implementation exists
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-directory-monitor.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL\|ERROR'
